description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular structure with a light wood grain finish on the top, sides, and drawer fronts. The front face displays three spacious drawers, each equipped with two small, round, dark-colored knob handles. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the same wood texture without any additional features or embellishments. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and no visible decorative carvings or patterns. The construction suggests it is made primarily of engineered wood or laminated particleboard, typical for modern urban furniture.
description: A light wood grain chest of drawers with three drawers, each featuring two round dark knobs. The design is minimalist, with a flat top and plain sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, plain doors or drawer fronts with a subtle vertical seam and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, light wood grain panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing three drawers, each with two round dark knobs, and the wood grain texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a plain wood grain panel and no visible features.
